title: Lexibook, Aerofoot, Hovercraft Soccer disc, 2 Goals, Pump and Inflatable Ball Included, Glides Easily, Fast and Dynamic, Light Effects, Anti-Shock Foam Edges, Rechargeable, JG981
features: Play indoors and outdoors with the hovercraft soccer disc, inflatable soccer ball and 2 goals included.
Super dynamic hovercraft effect! Air escapes from the disc and provides fast and thrilling play!
Easily slides on every flat surface.
Anti-shock foam edges to protect your walls and furniture.
Light effects to play even in the dark.
Includes 2 goals: easy to assemble and convenient to carry around!
Anti-shock foam edges to protect your walls and furnitures.
Includes 11 cm inflatable soccer ball and pump.
Rechargeable battery and USB cable included. Charge time: 2 hours / Play time: 45 minutes
Disc dimensions: 18 x 18 x 7 cm. Goal dimensions: 48 (L) X 25 (h) cm.
description: From the manufacturer The hovering soccer disc for ultra-dynamic games! This disc has a hovercraft effect. Air escapes from the disc to make the games very dynamic. This effect allows it to slide very easily on all types of flat surfaces. Hours of play ahead! Play safely thanks to the foam edges. This disc has shock-proof foam edges that provide good protection for walls, furniture and children! Colorful games with light effects! Light effects are integrated on the disc to continue the games after dark or in the dark. What a way to give color to the games! How to use your Aerofoot disc? Once you have turned on the hoverboard disc and the light effects, simply kick the hoverboard soccer disc on a flat surface, indoors or outdoors. The air coming out of the disc will give impetus to the strike. For added fun, two goals are included in the box. Thanks to their quick and easy assembly, the first games will not be long in coming. Perfect for team play, or for practicing scoring on your own in front of the goal! An inflatable ball and a pump are also included to fully enjoy the soccer games. Included in the box: Aerofoot, the hoverboard soccer disc! 2 easy to assemble goals (2 nets, 12 connectors and 12 tubes) 11cm diameter inflatable ball Pump Instructions manual Recharge cable Works with a rechargeable battery (included). About Lexibook Lexibook is a company that designs, manufactures, and markets consumer electronics products throughout Europe. Lexibook is the European champion of licensed entertainment electronics and collaborates with multiple partners such as Disney, Marvel, Warner, Universal, Paramount... This success can be explained by a strategy that includes strong, international, and often exclusive licenses (Barbie, Spiderman, Oui-Oui, Disney, etc.), as well as by high added value products that include electronics (educational computers, televisions).
